description: Likely selects a target object, region, or abstracted grid and outputs a smaller crop or compressed representation. Removes input color(s) [2, 5, 7, 9]; output colors are a subset of input colors. Primary structural cue: smaller output. Inferred transformation family: crop/extract/select.
arcDslCode:
from dsl import *
from constants import *


def solve_662c240a(I):
    x1 = vsplit(I, THREE)
    x2 = fork(equality, dmirror, identity)
    x3 = compose(flip, x2)
    O = extract(x1, x3)
    return O
